headline: A small collection, by request
lede: Field guides, naturalist references, and a few books on how people relate to local nature — shared with people who are interested in looking more carefully at the spaces around them. Access is by request and reviewed individually.
form_description: Tell me a little about yourself and what draws you to local nature. I read every request personally — once approved, I'll set up access and send it your way.
form_success: Request sent — I'll be in touch.
form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
